topology.aggregate_demand_invariant: demand_A + demand_B equals the original aggregate demand tape
topology.aggregate_capacity_invariant: dispatch_A + dispatch_B <= min(Op9 stock, fixed daily downstream capacity)

destination_assignment.method: sha256 keyed by simulation_seed and order_id

allocation_is_live_when: both destinations compete for the shared capacity pool
post-disruption backlog is being cleared with both paths available
localized R24 demand creates imbalance while both paths are available
liveness_boundary.allocation_is_moot_when: only one destination can use capacity

forbidden: increasing total downstream capacity through the allocation action
future risk, repair, or demand information
